confirmActionMsg: Are you sure you want to perform this action?
textChannelDesc: Share text, images, files and more
voiceChannelDesc: Hangout with voice, video and screen sharing
createInviteDesc: Create a new invitation link for users to join the server.
assignRoleDesc: Users joining with this invite will be assigned this role.
wipeDestructiveWarning: This will permanently delete the user and all associated data, including messages, emojis, reactions, and files. This completely wipes the user from the server.
wipeInfoWarning: This will delete the user but keep their messages and data intact. The user will be removed from the server, but their messages, emojis, reactions, and files will remain as "Deleted User".
confirmDeleteMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action cannot be undone.
confirmDeleteMsgWithWipe: Are you sure you want to delete this user and all associated data? This action cannot be undone.
selfRoleAssignWarning: You are assigning a role to yourself.
userHasAllRoles: This user already has all available roles.
searchDesc: Find content in this server. Both messages and files are searchable.
searchHint: Start typing to search messages and files. Type at least 2 characters.
noSettingsAvailable: No settings available for this plugin
logsWillAppear: Logs will appear here when the plugin generates them
noCommandsAvailable: No commands available for this plugin
noArgsRequired: This command does not require any arguments.
serverPasswordDesc: This server is password protected. Please enter the password to join.
welcomeProfileSetupDesc: Let's set up your profile to get started.
welcomeUploadError: Could not upload file. Please try again.
pluginInstallConfirmLead: Plugins are a very powerful way to extend Sharkord's functionality, but they also come with significant security risks.
pluginInstallWarningLine1: Plugins can read, modify, or delete
pluginInstallWarningHighlight3: user accounts, steal data, or damage your server
pluginInstallUseDocker: We strongly recommend running Sharkord in a Docker container for isolation and reduced risk.
pluginInstallDocsNote: For more details, read the docs at:
